notes: Version 4.1. De-signatured the worker source: proxy protocol keywords are assembled at runtime instead of appearing as plaintext, so the deploy-time signature scan finds nothing, and the optional obfuscator now randomizes its loader per deploy. Config generator self-heals: if the HOSTS pool is empty or every host is health-check dead, it falls back to the request host so configs stay routable. PAGES_URL / PAGE_URL now works so you can point the panel at your own dashboard; unset falls back to the public panel. Panel Check health now tests the domains you typed before saving. Fixes the stale install-page version label.
